prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated D16A9 (1.6L SOHC 16V, 135 PS) with a custom-built Toda Racing billet crankshaft (84mm stroke) and forged JE Pistons (8.5:1 compression) paired with Eagle H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM reliability up to 9,000 RPM. The cylinder head is ported and polished by HKS with oversized Ferrea intake/exhaust valves (33mm/29mm) and a custom Toda Racing Type-R camshaft (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) for aggressive mid-to-high-end power delivery.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a GReddy intercooler (550x225x76mm core) mounted in the stock front bumper location. The turbo system is fed by a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (equal-length, 4-2-1 design) and a 3-inch HKS Hi-Power exhaust with a custom 2.5-inch cat-back section terminating in a Burns Stainless muffler for optimal spool and flow.

Fuel and ignition system upgraded with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU controlling dual 1000cc ID1000 injectors (side-feed, Honda-specific) and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump. Ignition is handled by a set of NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (7164) gapped at 0.028" and a custom MSD Digital 6AL ignition box with a Honda-specific coil pack setup. The cooling system is upgraded with a Koyorad aluminum radiator (2-row, 36mm core) and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for consistent temperature management.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 2 widebody kit (CR-X-specific, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (15mm wider front, 20mm wider rear) to accommodate 16x9.5" (front) and 16x10.5" (rear) Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (ET15/ET0, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (215/45/16 front, 245/40/16 rear).

Custom front lip and rear diffuser by Varis Japan (CR-X-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber) with a custom aluminum rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals. The hood is replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type-R style, vented) with a custom 3-inch aluminum hood scoop for intercooler ducting.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seat (Honda-specific mounting brackets) and a Takata 4-point harness. The dashboard is replaced with a custom carbon fiber panel housing a Defi BF Series 60mm oil pressure/temperature gauge, a 100mm boost gauge, and a 80mm water temperature gauge. The stock steering wheel is swapped for a Nardi Classic 350mm suede wheel with a Honda-specific quick-release hub.
